idinfo.native: Microsoft Windows XP Version 5.1 (Build 2600) Service Pack 2; ESRI ArcCatalog 9.1.0.722

descript.abstract: This data is a polygon representation of the Area of Montgomery County. Last Updated - 02/20/2017
descript.purpose: To show the boundary, Area, Perimeter and Extent of Montgomery, TN.
descript.supplinf: This shapefile represents the Administrative Boundaries for Montgomery County, TN.

citeinfo.origin: Tax Assessors Office; Regional Planning Commission Point-of-Contact:James Anderson Regional Planning Commission 645-7448
citeinfo.title: county

pubinfo.pubplace: Austin Peay State University Clarksville, TN

citeinfo.othercit: The Montgomery County Limit Boundary was origianlly digitized by the 1998 State Contract by SDS Inc. The official maintenance of the Boundary was then taken over by the Regional Planning Commission.

citeinfo.title: City of Clarksville/Montgomery County GIS Project

theme.themekt: Reference to a formally registered thesaurus or a similar authoritative source of theme keywords. REQUIRED.
theme.themekey: A Polygon Theme Displaying the Montgomery County,TN Limit.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standards for Digital Geospatial Metadata

enttyp.enttypd: Polygon represents County Area, Perimeter Limits

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Numerical Distance Around Feature in Feet
Numerical Area of Feature in Acres

overview.dsoverv: This is a polygon shapefile that has one polygon representing Montgomery County TN.

cntaddr.address: APSU GIS Center P.O. Box 8373 Marks Building Room 243

distinfo.resdesc: The Clarksville/Mongermery County GIS Center is sponsoring all creation and shareing of data.

citeinfo.origin: Tax Assessors Office, Montgomery County TN
citeinfo.title: Current Tax Maps of Montgomery County

srcinfo.srccitea: Montgomery County Tax Maps from Tax Assessors Office
srcinfo.srccontr: Tax Assessors Office, City Surveyors, SDS Inc. digitization methods.

procstep.procdesc: The data source used to automate the City Limit was the Tax Assessor's parcel boundary maps at the scales of: 1":100' and 1":400'. After Initial creation the maintenance went to the RPC with Annexation updates maintained at the RPC.

attracc.attraccr: The City Limit border was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps. The City Limit was then updated by the RPC using legal descriptions of annexation areas.

qattracc.attracce: Age of Tax Maps that digital data is derived from. Description of Annexation Surveys accuracy.

dataqual.logic: The County Limit was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps.
dataqual.complete: The City Limit border was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps.

horizpa.horizpar: Should meet National Mapping Accuracy Standards for 1":400' maps.

qhorizpa.horizpae: The planimetric data collected was from imagery of 4 ft. accuracy of pixel to earths surface. The Tax Maps digitized were of older age of data collected years ago with older methods.

cntAddress.delPoint: APSU GIS Center P.O. Box 8373 Marks Building Room 243

onLineSrc.orDesc: The Clarksville/Mongermery County GIS Center is sponsoring all creation and shareing of data.

idCitation.otherCitDet: The Montgomery County Limit Boundary was origianlly digitized by the 1998 State Contract by SDS Inc. The official maintenance of the Boundary was then taken over by the Regional Planning Commission.
idCitation.collTitle: City of Clarksville/Montgomery County GIS Project

dataIdInfo.idAbs: This data is a polygon representation of the Area of Montgomery County. Last Updated - 02/20/2017
dataIdInfo.idPurp: Last Updated: 2009-09-18 To show the boundary, Area, Perimeter and Extent of Montgomery, TN.

themeKeys.keyword: A Polygon Theme Displaying the Montgomery County

searchKeys.keyword: A Polygon Theme Displaying the Montgomery County

aggrDSName.resTitle: City of Clarksville/Montgomery County GIS Project

dataIdInfo.suppInfo: This shapefile represents the Administrative Boundaries for Montgomery County, TN.

report.measDesc: The County Limit was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps.
The City Limit border was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps.

The City Limit border was digitized from Hard copy Tax Maps by SDS Inc. under a contract with the state. Guidelines of parcel boundaries were used along with the 1":100' and 1":400' maps. The City Limit was then updated by the RPC using legal descriptions of annexation areas.
report.evalMethDesc: Age of Tax Maps that digital data is derived from. Description of Annexation Surveys accuracy.

report.measDesc: Should meet National Mapping Accuracy Standards for 1":400' maps.
report.evalMethDesc: The planimetric data collected was from imagery of 4 ft. accuracy of pixel to earths surface. The Tax Maps digitized were of older age of data collected years ago with older methods.

prcStep.stepDesc: The data source used to automate the City Limit was the Tax Assessor's parcel boundary maps at the scales of: 1":100' and 1":400'. After Initial creation the maintenance went to the RPC with Annexation updates maintained at the RPC.

dataSource.srcDesc: Tax Assessors Office, City Surveyors, SDS Inc. digitization methods.
